meta.name: C Square Club — Design System Profile
meta.project: C Square Club Website, Chandigarh University

stack.styling: Tailwind CSS (inferred from Next.js + minimal aesthetic)
stack.rendering: Mixed SSG / ISR / CSR per page type

meta.reference_site: Envesty Business Suite — used as direct visual reference for design language

brand.identity: Clean, minimal, technical. Student-facing but credible. Black-and-white brand — no accent colors.
brand.tone: Professional with approachability. Technical club aesthetic — not corporate, not playful.

logo.treatment: Black on white, or white on black. High contrast only.

brand.tagline_style: Overline label in spaced caps above headline (e.g. 'CHANDIGARH UNIVERSITY · TECHNICAL CLUB')

color_system.philosophy: Strictly monochromatic. All UI is black, white, and grays. Zero brand accent colors.

status_colors.note: Status badges use grayscale — avoid color-coded status in the primary UI. Use text labels.

dark_sections.usage: Sparingly — hero callout blocks, inverted feature cards, footer

typography.philosophy: Large, confident type. Headlines dominate. Body text is compact and gray. Spaced-caps labels for categories and overlines.

font_stack.note: A geometric sans-serif like Inter is strongly implied by the reference site aesthetic

headline_treatment.pattern: Two-tone fade headline — first line full black, second line light gray

overline_pattern.style: font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: text_tertiary

spacing.philosophy: Generous whitespace. Sections breathe. Content is never crammed.

common_layouts.hero: Full-width centered, max-w-2xl text block, flanked by floating cards
common_layouts.two_col: 60/40 or 50/50 split — text left, visual right
common_layouts.three_col: Equal thirds — stat cards, feature cards, team member grid

navbar.style: Floating / sticky top, white background, subtle shadow or border-bottom

structure.left: Logo mark + optional wordmark or club name
structure.center: Primary navigation links (flat, no underline by default)

nav_links.active: text_primary, font-weight 500, optional underline or dot indicator

dropdown.panel: White card, border, rounded-xl, box-shadow, 2-column or single-column list

hero_section.layout: Center-aligned text block, full viewport height or min 70vh
hero_section.background: Light gray (#F5F5F5) with subtle dot grid pattern (CSS background-image radial-gradient)
hero_section.headline: 2–3 lines, bold, large, -0.03em letter-spacing

cta_group.secondary_button: White outlined pill or ghost pill

floating_testimonial_cards.placement: Scattered left and right columns flanking the hero center content
floating_testimonial_cards.style: White card, border, rounded-2xl, box-shadow-sm, slight rotation (-2deg to +3deg)
floating_testimonial_cards.content: Quote text (italic or normal) + attribution (em dash + name, font-weight 500)
floating_testimonial_cards.animation: Optional: subtle float or stagger on load

icon_only.style: Square or circle, 36–40px, border, rounded-lg or rounded-full

destructive.note: No red — destructive actions still use black/white in this design system

stat_card.layout: Horizontal row of equal-width bordered cells

event_card.badge: Small pill — bg:#F0F0F0, text:#555, border-radius:9999px, font-size:11px

forms.select: Same as input, with chevron icon right-aligned

form_section.section_divider: Optional gray border-top between logical groups
form_section.submit: Full-width black pill button at bottom

tables.actions_cell: Right-aligned, icon buttons or text links

modals.footer: flex justify-end gap-3, border-top: 1px solid #F0F0F0, padding-top: 20px

empty_states.title: 16px, font-weight 500, text_secondary
empty_states.cta: Optional — text link or ghost button below

qr_code_display.container: White card, centered, border, rounded-2xl, padding 32px
qr_code_display.label_below: Registration ID or student name, 13px, text_tertiary

scanner_ui.camera_viewport: Full-width rectangle with corner guide marks (no filled overlay — just corner brackets)
scanner_ui.success_state: Brief green flash — exception to monochrome (UX critical), or white flash with checkmark
scanner_ui.error_state: Red flash — exception to monochrome (UX critical), or dark panel with X icon
scanner_ui.result_card: Slides up from bottom — student name, UID, check-in time

list_item.structure: Checkbox | Avatar | Name + UID | Status pill | Check-in time

attendance_list.checked_state: Checkbox filled black, name slightly muted

logo_strip.layout: Horizontal scroll or flexbox row, space-evenly

stat_counter_row.layout: 3-column horizontal strip inside a bordered card
stat_counter_row.suffix: Same size or slightly smaller, color: text_secondary (e.g. '+')
stat_counter_row.label: 11px, spaced caps, text_tertiary

footer.bottom_bar: border-top: 1px solid #2A2A2A, flex justify-between, copyright + links

sections_order: Hero (headline + floating testimonial cards, dot-grid bg)
About / Why section (2-col: text left, image+dark card right)
CTA banner (dark bg section, centered headline + buttons)

events_listing.filters: Horizontal pill tabs — All / Hackathon / Competition / Workshop / Seminar

event_detail.layout: Left: event info, Right: registration card (sticky)

registration_card.style: Sticky sidebar card, border, rounded-2xl, padding 24px

student_dashboard.registration_list: Card list — event name, date, status badge, QR button

event_management.list_view: Table: Event name | Type | Date | Registrations | Status | Actions

registration_management.layout: Filterable table: Name | UID | Branch | Year | Status | Actions
registration_management.status_filter: Pill tabs — All / Pending / Approved / Rejected / Waitlisted

checkin_dashboard.progress: Thin horizontal bar — black fill on gray track

login_page.layout: Centered card, full viewport height, gray bg
login_page.post_submit_state: Same card, confirmation message: 'Check your email for a login link'

checkin_page.manual_list: Sticky search + scrollable attendance list with checkboxes

motion.philosophy: Subtle and functional. Transitions signal state, not entertain.
motion.page_load: Fade-in, 300ms, slight translateY(8px) to rest position
motion.card_stagger: Cards stagger in at 50ms intervals on page load
motion.floating_cards: Optional: gentle floating animation, 3–4s period, 6px vertical travel

icon_system.color: Inherits text color. Secondary icons use text_tertiary.

usage.actions: Edit2, Trash2, Eye, Download, Check, X

dot_grid.usage: Hero section backgrounds, full-page light sections

concentric_circles.description: Decorative radial rings centered behind hero content — subtle gray rings, no fill
concentric_circles.implementation: SVG or CSS box-shadow rings, opacity 0.12–0.2

patterns_and_textures.section_divider: 1px solid #E5E5E5, full width — no decorative dividers

responsive_strategy.navbar_mobile: Hamburger menu, full-screen slide-in overlay or bottom sheet
responsive_strategy.hero_mobile: Stack vertically, floating cards hidden on mobile, text centered

accessibility.contrast: All text meets WCAG AA (text_primary, text_secondary, and text_tertiary meet WCAG AA on white backgrounds; text_on_dark meets AA on dark background)
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label
accessibility.skip_link: Skip to main content — visually hidden, visible on focus

data_display_conventions.dates: Format: '15 Aug 2025, 10:00 AM' — no ambiguous MM/DD
data_display_conventions.capacity: Display as 'X / Y registered' or progress pill
data_display_conventions.registration_status: Always show as pill badge — never plain text
data_display_conventions.empty_tables: Centered empty state inside table area — not a raw 'no records' text
data_display_conventions.loading: Skeleton placeholders that match the shape of the content

email_design.philosophy: Plain, functional, on-brand. No image-heavy templates.
email_design.header: Club logo + name, centered, black on white
email_design.qr_section: Centered QR image, 200px, bordered, labeled below

django_admin_usage.note: Django Admin (/django-admin/) is used for back-office operations in Phase 1. No custom Next.js admin UI for team member management.
django_admin_usage.custom_admin_ui: Event management, registration approval, volunteer assignment, attendance export — built as custom Next.js admin dashboard under /admin/ route
django_admin_usage.native_django_admin: Team member CRUD only — accessible via /django-admin/

implementation_notes.component_library: Build from scratch using Tailwind — no component library dependency. Radix UI primitives acceptable for accessible modals, dropdowns, and checkboxes.
implementation_notes.image_handling: Next.js Image component, object-cover, rounded-xl for event banners, rounded-full for avatars
implementation_notes.dark_mode: Not required in v1 — monochrome system means light mode only
